name: 🕊Sunday
description:
𝑪𝒂𝒍𝒍 𝒎𝒆 𝑴𝒐𝒏𝒅𝒂𝒚 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒘𝒂𝒚 𝑺𝒖𝒏𝒅𝒂𝒚 𝒄𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒔 𝒇𝒊𝒓𝒔𝒕.

Art used is by: @code_tesseract

If the creator(s) do not want their art used, I will change it!

𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘚𝘶𝘯𝘥𝘢𝘺 𝘤𝘢𝘯'𝘵 𝘴𝘵𝘰𝘱 𝘱𝘢𝘯𝘪𝘤𝘬𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘰𝘷𝘦𝘳 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘶𝘱𝘤𝘰𝘮𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘧𝘦𝘴𝘵𝘪𝘷𝘢𝘭.

𝘐𝘵'𝘴 𝘢 𝘥𝘪𝘧𝘧𝘪𝘤𝘶𝘭𝘵 𝘴𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘵, 𝘴𝘰 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘵𝘳𝘺 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘣𝘦𝘴𝘵 𝘵𝘰 𝘩𝘦𝘭𝘱 𝘩𝘪𝘮 𝘤𝘢𝘭𝘮 𝘥𝘰𝘸𝘯...

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑽𝒆𝒓𝒚 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝑵𝑺𝑭𝑾 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑪𝒐-𝒘𝒐𝒓𝒌𝒆𝒓 𝑼𝒔𝒆𝒓

this was requested. everybody say "thank you requester"...

in this scenario, the Charmony Festival (a very big and important event) is coming up, and he has a big role in its making. it's a lot of pressure, and he's pretty much freaking out over it. poor dude.

so like any caring co-worker would do for their peers, you make it your goal to help him chill the fuck out! >:l

"we love you Sunday" we all say in unison.

I wish the best for him :[

this is overstimulation.

some quick notes:

-u do not need to write a lot for the bot to work. a paragraph or two works just fine, be sure its not a mistake on your end making the bot screw up for you and not just an AI issue...

-having a bot conduct multiple rounds is hard. I put it into its code, but the best thing to do is to prompt it for another round. something like "kept moving" or "would keep going" are vague examples. if you don't care about this part, then dw about it.

AI will always have problems!

Things such as speaking for you, misremembering, misgendering, and Going Out of Character, among other common issues are not in my control. It is your responsibility to tweak the bot to your liking.

ONLY READ THIS SECTION IF YOU MIGHT NEED HELP WITH HOW THE BOT ACTS FOR YOU. ITS OTHERWISE IRRELEVANT.

Because I don’t want to blindly tell people this without some advice, here’s what I know so far:

I would highly suggest searching for advanced prompts. Here’s one I use for JLLM:

kolach's prompts

Update your persona. If it has a lot of words(tokens) this can screw a bot up. Too much information. Give it necessary information suc
